fields.name: Planned Prod. Orders - All
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of planned production orders that are displayed in the Manufacturing Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Firm Plan. Prod. Orders - All
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of firm planned production orders that are displayed in the Manufacturing Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Released Prod. Orders - All
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of released production orders that are displayed in the Manufacturing Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Prod. BOMs under Development
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of production BOMs that are under development that are displayed in the Manufacturing Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Routings under Development
fields.tooltip: Specifies the routings under development that are displayed in the Manufacturing Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Purchase Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of purchase orders that are displayed in the Manufacturing Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Prod. Orders Routings-in Queue
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many production order routing lines are in queue. The documents are filtered by today's date. Finished production orders are excluded.

fields.name: Prod. Orders Routings-in Prog.
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many production order routing lines are in progress. The documents are filtered by today's date. Only released production orders are included.

fields.name: Invt. Picks to Production
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of inventory picks that are displayed in the Manufacturing Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Invt. Put-aways from Prod.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of inventory put-always from production that are displayed in the Manufacturing Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Rlsd. Prod. Orders Until Today
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of released production orders that are displayed in the Manufacturing Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Simulated Prod. Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of simulated production orders that are displayed in the Manufacturing Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date interval that values are filtered by.
If this field contains starting and ending dates for a date interval, then other field values only show information for that interval.
You can enter a date interval according to the following rules.


Meaning


Sample expression


Entries that are included


Equal to

12 15 12

Only entries that are posted on December 15, 2012.


Interval

12 15 12..01 15 13
..12 15 12

Entries that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and January 15, 2013.
Entries that are posted on January 15, 2012, or earlier.


Either/or

12 15 12|12 16 12

Entries that are posted on either December 15, 2012, or December 16, 2012. If there are entries that are posted on both days, then all entries are displayed.


You can also combine the various format types.


Sample expression


Entries that are included


12 15 12|12 01 12..12 10 12

Entries that are posted either on December 15, 2012, or on dates between and including December 1, 2012, and December 10, 2012.


..12 14 12|12 30 12..

Entries that are posted on December 14, 2012, or earlier, or entries that are posted on December 30, 2012, or later, which includes all entries except those that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and December 29, 2012.

fields.name: User ID Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user ID that is used to filter the documents that are displayed in the Manufacturing Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.
